title: Maine Dept. of Agriculture, Conservation and Forestry Newsroom
description:
Repeating

headline

blocks, scoped to the main content region to exclude site nav/header headings, followed by a date/summary paragraph. NEEDS SELECTOR REVIEW: per-item date is in a sibling

element not reachable from the h2 with a simple descendant selector, so items are timestamped when first observed.
